config.script:
#ifndef ACTIVE_PAGE_IID #define ACTIVE_PAGE_IID -1 #endif
dim pM60121 : set pM60121 = doc_.getmodule(60121)
function update_toolbar(byref pPage)
page_.ctrl(101).disable = not doc_.iscmdenabled(CMD_GOBACK)
dim strTip : strTip = "" if not pPage is nothing then strTip = "Zamknij okno """ + pPage.topelement.title + """" end if page_.ctrl(101).tip = strTip
page_.ctrl(102).disable = not doc_.iscmdenabled(CMD_NEWFORM) page_.ctrl(103).disable = not doc_.iscmdenabled(CMD_SAVEFORM) page_.ctrl(104).disable = not doc_.iscmdenabled(CMD_DELETEFORM) page_.ctrl(105).disable = not doc_.iscmdenabled(CMD_UNDO)
page_.ctrl(106).disable = not doc_.iscmdenabled(CMD_PRINT) page_.ctrl(115).disable = not doc_.iscmdenabled(CMD_PRINTPREVIEW)
page_.ctrl(107).disable = not doc_.iscmdenabled(CMD_COPY) page_.ctrl(108).disable = not doc_.iscmdenabled(CMD_PASTE)
page_.ctrl(109).disable = not doc_.iscmdenabled(CMD_FIRSTINCURSOR) page_.ctrl(110).disable = not doc_.iscmdenabled(CMD_PREVINCURSOR) page_.ctrl(111).disable = not doc_.iscmdenabled(CMD_SEARCH) page_.ctrl(112).disable = not doc_.iscmdenabled(CMD_NEXTINCURSOR) page_.ctrl(113).disable = not doc_.iscmdenabled(CMD_LASTINCURSOR)
page_.ctrl(114).disable = not doc_.iscmdenabled(CMD_OPTIONS)
page_.ctrl(138).disable = not doc_.iscmdenabled(CMD_ENABLEEDIT) page_.ctrl(139).disable = not doc_.iscmdenabled(CMD_REFRESH)
with page_.ctrl(200) dim nErrorLevel : nErrorLevel = doc_.isnewmessage() if nErrorLevel = 0 then .disable = true .image = 80013 else doc_.postcommand "varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=4 varNewThread=1" .disable = false if nErrorLevel = 1 then .image = 80013 else .image = 80014 end if end if end with dim strFirma : strFirma = pM60121.getFirmaSkrot page_.ctrl(116).text = strFirma if page_.ctrl(117).text = "" then page_.ctrl(117).text = "Data bieżąca: " + cstr(year(now)) + "-" + right(cstr(100 + month(now)),2) + "-" + right(cstr(100 + day(now)),2) else dim dSystemDate : dSystemDate = pM60121.strSystemDate page_.ctrl(117).text = "Data bieżąca: " + dSystemDate end if
#ifdef _TANDEM_BAITS if pM60121.isDBProdukcja then page_.ctrl(101).parent.backcolor = rgb(255,200,200) end if #endif end function
function system_date dim oM20351 : set oM20351 = doc_.getmodule(20351) if not oM20351 is nothing then oM20351.domodalauto dim dSystemDate : dSystemDate = oM20351.strSystemDate page_.ctrl(117).text = "Data bieżąca: " + dSystemDate end if end function
